info.name: Ninja Teacher API
info.description: كل الـ endpoints — Teachers, Schools, Admin, Subscriptions, Payments

body.raw:
{
  "School_ID": 1,
  "Job_ID": 1,
  "Title": "Math Teacher",
  "Specialization": "Mathematics",
  "Required_Experience": 2,
  "Content": "Full-time position",
  "Description": "Looking for an experienced math teacher."
}

exec: if(d) { pm.collectionVariables.set('sub_id', d.id); pm.test('Status active', () => pm.expect(d.status).to.eql('active')); }
